title: Dimension Control | Disable and Enable end and nether
description: A simple light weight plugin which allows admin's to disable and enable End and Nether Dimension's!
body:
# 🌌 DimensionControl — Simple Dimension Access Management

DimensionControl is a lightweight, no-setup Bukkit/Spigot plugin that gives server admins full control over access to the End and Nether dimensions. Whether you're hosting special events, managing player progression, or simply want to temporarily restrict portal travel, this plugin makes it quick and easy — all with simple commands.

## ✅ Features:
Toggle access to The End and The Nether with a single command

Automatically blocks players from teleporting or using portals when a dimension is closed

Zero configuration required — just drop it in your plugins folder

## 🚀 Commands:

![commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95d89be9e0acc712db0d2f388d6a0000251112ae.jpeg)
### /end close
➤ Prevents players from entering the End!

### /end open
➤ Re-enables access to the End

### /nether close
➤ Prevents players from entering the Nether

### /nether open
➤ Re-enables access to the Nether

## 🔑 Permissions
➤ dimensioncontrol.bypass – Full access to all locked dimensions

➤ dimensioncontrol.bypass.end – Bypass End restrictions only

➤ dimensioncontrol.bypass.nether – Bypass Nether restrictions only

(Operators bypass by default — no extra setup required)
